When are you gonna make public servers?
I played it and it’s good!

This is a real one. And not one that just says: "good game"

This game has a bright future. It has a good show and the physics are quite good. I played it with my brother and the mic systemen is great. The costmetics are good (for the ones that are there) and the mirror is ACTUALLY 3D.

There are some downsides. The maps are really big and with that there is an obvious flaw. The maps are boring. Yes when you play them for the first time its cool. But when you stop going there. There is no reason to go back. the maps are also a bit too simular to gorilla tag. You have forest, caves and citys. I thought it would be more into the robot catagory. The maps have potential but now they are a bit bland. (Small note. The stopping noises are really load)

Overall this game is fun to play and it is still in bèta. The creators have shocked me with this game for how well thus game plays. This game is really fun and you should really check it out when you have nothing to do.

(Note to creators: maby you guys can make a discord group to report bugs and make anouncements. And if you already have, thats cool)
